name: NouPro Design System
description: Design guidelines for the NouPro B2B distribution management app. This file serves as the single source of truth for all UI/UX decisions.

designPrinciples.philosophy: Clean, professional, and efficient design focused on B2B workflows. Prioritize clarity over decoration.

core.name: Clarity First
core.description: Every element should have a clear purpose. Use whitespace generously to separate content areas.

core.name: Consistent Patterns
core.description: Reuse established patterns across screens. Cards, headers, modals, and buttons should behave predictably.

core.name: Hierarchical Information
core.description: Use typography weight and size to establish visual hierarchy. Primary info is bold/larger, secondary is lighter/smaller.

core.name: Actionable Feedback
core.description: Every interaction should provide immediate visual feedback. Loading states, success/error indicators, and transitions.

core.name: Mobile-First Density
core.description: Balance information density with touch-friendly tap targets (minimum 44px). Lists should show enough context without scrolling.

brandIdentity.visualStyle: Modern minimalist with warm neutral undertones

primary.usage: Primary actions, headers, important text, main buttons

accent.usage: Notifications, badges, attention-grabbing elements, accent indicators

surface.usage: Elevated surfaces, input backgrounds, secondary backgrounds

confirmDialogDarkRed.usage: Background color for delete/destructive confirmation dialogs (used at 90% opacity)

confirmDialogDarkGreen.usage: Background color for success/positive confirmation dialogs (used at 90% opacity). Also used as text color for confirm button.

muted.usage: Placeholders, inactive states, disabled text, muted icons

inverse.usage: Text on dark backgrounds, primary button text

success.usage: Completed orders, paid invoices, available products, positive states

error.usage: Failed actions, overdue payments, out of stock, validation errors

warning.usage: Pending items, attention needed, expiring items

info.usage: In-progress states, informational messages, ongoing deliveries, links

neutral.usage: Draft states, inactive items, cancelled orders

outOfStock.usage: Out of stock products (alias for unpaid)

border.usage: Card borders, dividers, input borders, list separators

highlightedRow.usage: Unread messages, new items, highlighted states

iconMuted.usage: Muted icons, inactive icons, disabled icons

avatarColors.description: Colors for random avatar background assignment

base.usage: Body text, button text, input text

bodyBold.usage: Emphasized body text, names, important labels

iconButtons.variants: Same as buttons (primary, secondary, outline, disabled, alert, confirm)

checkbox.description: Unified checkbox component for selection states throughout the app. Use this for all checkbox implementations.

touchTarget.description: Touch area should be at least 44px for accessibility

usage: Product loaded status in delivery tables

textField.description: Unified text field design - applies to AppTextField, Password, Numeric, Phone, Email, and Selection/Dropdown fields

label.description: Label positioned ABOVE the field, not inside

filled.description: Field has value, not focused (deactivated after typing)

password.description: Password input with secureTextEntry and optional show/hide toggle

dropdown.description: Selection/dropdown field that opens a modal

multiSelect.description: When field represents multiple selected items, display count

multiline.description: Text area mode for longer text input

withIcon.description: When field has a left icon
withIcon.iconPosition: centered between left edge and text

listCard.description: Standard card for list items (products, invoices, deliveries)

elevatedCard.description: Cards with slight elevation for standalone content

checklistTable.description: Table layout for product checklists with image, info, quantity, loaded status, and actions. Used in DeliveryDetailScreen for loaded items checklist.

quantity.description: Quantity ordered with optional stock warning

responsiveFontSize.description: Reduce font size when quantity has more than 5 digits

headers.description: Unified header system with three specialized components

primaryHeader.description: Main header for primary navigating screens (Home, Deliveries, Products, Invoices, etc.). Left-aligned title with optional dropdown and right action icons.

chevron.description: Shown when onTitlePress is provided (dropdown functionality)

badge.description: Optional badge for notification counts on action icons

props.title: string (required)
props.subtitle: string (optional)
props.actions: HeaderAction[] (optional, right side icons with optional badges)

secondaryHeader.description: Header for secondary/detail screens (detail views, create forms, settings, overlays). Center-aligned title with optional back button and right actions.

iconSize.note: Chevron icons (chevron-left, chevron-right, etc.) use 32px for visual balance with solid icons at 28px

transparent.description: Transparent background with optional overlay tint for readability on images

chatHeader.description: Specialized header for chat/conversation screens. Based on SecondaryHeader but simplified without transparency logic.

iconSize.note: Chevron icons use 32px for visual balance with solid icons at 28px

props.title: string (required)
props.rightAction: HeaderAction (optional, single action e.g. profile icon)

HeaderAction.description: Type definition for header action buttons

NewHeader.description: Backward-compatible wrapper around SecondaryHeader. Use SecondaryHeader directly for new code.

AppHeader.description: Old header with leftTitleHeader and middleTitleHeader variants. Use PrimaryHeader or SecondaryHeader instead.

SimpleHeader.description: Complex scrollable header. Use PrimaryHeader + separate scroll logic if needed.

bottomTabBar.description: Bottom tab navigation bar for Personal and Business modes

selected.description: Primary color, extraBold weight for selected tab

unselected.description: textSecondary color, medium weight for unselected tabs

profileIcon.description: Profile tab uses user/business avatar instead of icon

filterBar.description: Default filter bar/tab bar design used across all screens (Inbox, Activity, Profile tabs, etc.). Takes full width with indicator touching screen edges.
filterBar.usage: Apply consistently across all list screens with filters and profile screen tabs. Indicator spans full tab width allowing it to touch screen edges when first/last tab is selected.

actionBottomSheet.description: Bottom sheet modal for options/actions (3-dots menus, role selection, etc.)

default.description: Default outline button - primary color for text and border

destructive.description: Remove/delete/cancel actions - error red for text and border

actionBottomSheet.usage: Use for all 3-dots option menus, role selection sheets, and action lists throughout the app

confirmationDialog.description: Centered confirmation dialogs with three variants: 'delete' for destructive actions, 'confirm' for asking confirmation BEFORE an action, 'success' for feedback AFTER an action completes

delete.description: Dark red variant for destructive actions (delete, remove, discard)

confirm.description: Dark green variant for asking confirmation BEFORE an action (save changes?, proceed?, confirm order?). NO icon - used when waiting for user decision.

success.description: Dark green variant for success feedback AFTER an action completes. Shows checkmark icon to indicate completion.

settingsListItem.description: Standard settings/options list item design. Used for navigation lists, settings screens, and option menus.
settingsListItem.usage: Settings screens, option menus, navigation lists with icon + title + chevron pattern

communityButton.description: Help the Community grow button - promotional/feedback CTA used in settings screens

subtitle.text: Propose features, report bugs, and share your feedback

communityButton.usage: Settings screens footer - links to community feedback page

modalListItem.description: List item design for modal/bottom sheet lists. Inherits from settingsListItem pattern.
modalListItem.usage: Modal lists, bottom sheet selection lists, dropdown menus

chatBubbles.description: Chat message bubbles design for ChatScreen (V1 Light: simplified, no attachments/voice)

order.description: Order message bubble - clickable to navigate to Order Details

pdf.description: PDF/Document message bubble (invoices only in V1)

voice.description: Voice message bubble (receive only in V1)

event.description: Event/System message bubble - no timestamp, displays only event text. Date Separator is separate and always appears above event messages.

dateSeparator.description: WhatsApp-style date headers shown between messages from different days. Always appears ABOVE Event/System messages on the same date.

staffCard.description: Staff member card design for team management screens

businessProfileCover.description: Cover image design for business profile screens

businessProfileAbout.description: About Us section design for business profile screens

switch.usage: Privacy toggles, settings switches, feature toggles

userProfile.description: Personal user profile design for SELF_PROFILE and OTHER_USER views

aboutSection.description: Bio/description text displayed in secondary color

contactSection.description: About section with phone, email, address - visibility controlled by privacy

feedPosts.description: Feed post components design (brand_presentation, company_presentation, new_products)

productCard.description: Product cards used in brand_presentation and new_products posts

brandCard.description: Brand cards used in company_presentation posts
brandCard.note: No grey background - brand cards are now transparent

brandPresentation.description: Post type: brand_presentation - showcases a brand with products

companyPresentation.description: Post type: company_presentation - presents a company with their brands

connectButton.alignment: vertically centered with company name and location

connected.description: Secondary button style when already connected

newProducts.description: Post type: new_products - shows newly added or received products

distributor_added.description: Plus icon without circle for 'added new products'

timestamp.note: Timestamp removed from new products post

proHome.description: Pro Mode Home dashboard design (Business Mode)

header.description: Use PrimaryHeader with notification and inbox icons with badges
header.note: See headers.primaryHeader for exact specifications (height: 56, title fontSize: 32/600, iconSize: 24, badge specifications)

companySelector.description: Use onTitlePress prop with subtitle for company name when user has multiple companies

quickActions.description: 2x2 grid of quick action buttons (DEPRECATED - removed from Pro Home)

priorityQueue.description: Priority items needing attention (DEPRECATED - removed from Pro Home)

activityTimeline.description: Recent activity feed showing the 5 most recent business updates

behavior.displayRule: Show only the 5 most recent activity items

emptyState.description: Your recent business activity will appear here

iconBox.note: Icon and background use same color, background at 20% opacity

postsSection.description: Feed posts section with white background
postsSection.note: Uses same feed post components as Personal mode (BrandPresentationPost, CompanyPresentationPost, NewProductPost)

overlayScreens.description: Design for overlay screens (Inbox, Notifications) that slide from right

header.description: Use SecondaryHeader with solid variant for overlay screens
header.note: See headers.secondaryHeader for exact specifications (height: 56, iconSize: 28, title fontSize: 24)

inboxOverlay.description: Inbox accessed via Home header or swipe left

unreadState.description: Unread items use highlighted background (consistent with DeliveryCard/InvoiceCard)

timestamp.description: Displayed on same line as title

staffButton.description: Small outline button for role selection, full width

overlayScreen.description: Overlay screens that slide from right and hide tab bar
structure: Header with back button, centered title, optional action

homeScreenWithOverlays.description: Home screens (Personal or Pro) with header icons for overlays

components: Empty state with icon and message

guidelines: All interactive elements must have minimum 44x44px touch targets
Use semantic labels for screen readers
Provide loading and error state feedback

dos: Always use theme tokens instead of hardcoded values
Use the Typography component for all text
Apply consistent padding using spacing scale
Use Pill component for all status indicators
Follow the established card patterns for list items
Use useTheme() hook to access theme values
Apply border-bottom pattern for list separators
Use consistent icon sizes from the scale
donts: Don't use inline color values - reference theme colors
Don't mix px/dp values - use spacing scale
Don't create new button styles - use existing variants
Don't use different fonts - stick to Inter family
Don't hardcode status colors - use the semantic mappings
Don't create custom shadows - use shadow scale
Don't use different border radius values - use scale

resolvedInconsistencies.description: Previously identified inconsistencies that have been addressed

resolved.solution: Extended theme with comprehensive color palette (textMuted, textSubtle, highlightedRow, badgeBackground, etc.) and updated key components to use appTheme.colors
Updated key components (ActionBottomSheet, InvoiceCard, DeliveryCard, MessageCard, etc.) to use theme.spacing values
Replaced fontWeight: '600' with fontFamily: theme.fonts.primary.medium in updated components
Added avatarSizes scale to theme (xs: 32, sm: 40, md: 52, lg: 64, xl: 72) and updated Avatar component defaults

remainingWork.description: Some components still have hardcoded values and should be updated gradually
remainingWork.pattern: Follow the same pattern used in updated components: import theme, use appTheme.colors for runtime colors, theme.spacing for static spacing
